ddls:
CREATE TABLE "btc_price_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "btc_to_usdt" REAL /* Price of 250 BTC in USDT */,
  "changes" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "changes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume in USDT for the day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of BTC in USDT for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of BTC in USDT for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of BTC in USDT for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of BTC in USDT for the day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of BTC in USDT for the day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API from a specific exchange) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Coinbase, Binance) */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* API URL for the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
